title: e2e tests: "podman run findmnt shared" test failed on rootless with STORAGE_FS=overlay
body:
### Issue Description

`podman run findmnt shared` test failed on rootless with `STORAGE_FS=overlay`
because the mount propagation has `slave`.

As per the test results, should the overlay, rootless environment have `slave`?

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Run the e2e test on rootless with `STORAGE_FS=overlay`.

```console
$ FOCUS="podman run findmnt shared" STORAGE_FS=overlay make localintegration
```

### Describe the results you received

<details>
<summary>Error log</summary>

```
  Running: /home/test/podman/bin/podman --storage-opt overlay.imagestore=/tmp/ginkgo1444224062/imagecachedir --root /tmp/podman_test1408330400/root --runroot /tmp/podman_test1408330400/runroot --runtime crun --conmon /usr/bin/conmon --network-config-dir /home/test/.config/cni/net.d --network-backend cni --cgroup-manager cgroupfs --tmpdir /tmp/podman_test1408330400 --events-backend file --db-backend boltdb --storage-driver overlay run --volume /tmp/podman_test1408330400/vol-test1:/myvol1:z --volume /tmp/podman_test1408330400/vol-test2:/myvol2:shared,z registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minimal:34 findmnt -o TARGET,PROPAGATION
  TARGET                  PROPAGATION
  /                       shared
  |-/sys                  private
  | |-/sys/fs/cgroup      private
  | |-/sys/firmware       private
  | |-/sys/fs/selinux     private

  | |-/proc/scsi          private

  | `-/proc/sysrq-trigger private

  | |-/dev/shm            private

  | |-/dev/zero           private
  | |-/dev/full           private
  | |-/dev/tty            private
  | |-/dev/random         private
  | `-/dev/urandom        private
  |-/myvol1               private
  |-/etc/hosts            private
  |-/etc/resolv.conf      private
  |-/run/.containerenv    private
  |-/run/secrets          private
  `-/etc/hostname         private
  [FAILED] Expected
      <string>: TARGET PROPAGATION / shared |-/sys private | |-/sys/fs/cgroup private | |-/sys/firmware private | |-/sys/fs/selinux private | `-/sys/dev/block private |-/myvol2 shared,slave |-/proc private | |-/proc/acpi private | |-/proc/kcore private,slave | |-/proc/keys private,slave | |-/proc/latency_stats private,slave | |-/proc/timer_list private,slave | |-/proc/scsi private | |-/proc/bus private | |-/proc/fs private | |-/proc/irq private | |-/proc/sys private | `-/proc/sysrq-trigger private |-/dev private | |-/dev/pts private | |-/dev/mqueue private | |-/dev/shm private | |-/dev/null private | |-/dev/zero private | |-/dev/full private | |-/dev/tty private | |-/dev/random private | `-/dev/urandom private |-/myvol1 private |-/etc/hosts private |-/etc/resolv.conf private |-/run/.containerenv private |-/run/secrets private `-/etc/hostname private
  not to contain substring
      <string>: shared,
  In [It] at: /home/test/podman/test/e2e/run_test.go:1274 @ 09/21/23 16:36:29.415

  Full Stack Trace
    github.com/containers/podman/v4/test/e2e.glob..func100.69()
        /home/test/podman/test/e2e/run_test.go:1274 +0x552

---

Summarizing 1 Failure:
  [FAIL] Podman run [It] podman run findmnt shared
  /home/test/podman/test/e2e/run_test.go:1274

Ran 1 of 2103 Specs in 12.959 seconds
FAIL! -- 0 Passed | 1 Failed | 0 Pending | 2102 Skipped
```
</details>

### Describe the results you expected

This test should succeed.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

When setting `STORAGE_FS=vfs` (default), this test successed.

```
Ran 1 of 2103 Specs in 13.181 seconds
SUCCESS! -- 1 Passed | 0 Failed | 0 Pending | 2102 Skipped
```

comments.body:
the test is not correct, for rootless it would show "shared" only if the user owns the outer mount namespace.

Opened a PR: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20083
